title: Operating Room No Longer Available
scenario: A surgical procedure reaches execution but the assigned operating room becomes unavailable.
state_transition: The operating room becomes unavailable before execution.
execution_boundary: The procedure is evaluated immediately before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution requires currently available execution resources.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because the required operating room resource is unavailable.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when the execution environment disappears.
